name: Shopping Trip from Hell
description:
Requested!

The Forsaken Gang goes on a shopping trip! Simple as that. Chaos ensues, you know the drill.

This takes place in the same post-escape world as Freedom So Sweet, just for context. So the survivors and killers are all mixed, and Gasharpoon makes a return! Something about needing citrus fruits... and Mafioso & goons are joining for the hell of it.

Characters:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar, Azure, Slasher, John Doe, Jane Doe, Mafioso, Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli, MrDoombringer, Guest 666/Sixer, Daisy, Charlotte.

Hey while you're at the shop, grab yourself a water, yeah? And stretch before, you might need to outrun someone with a shopping cart.
creator: Subconscious
